message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.

Setting up the participant structure (pools and lanes) first.

Modeling the complete return process inside the retailer pool (with lanes) and the customer as a collapsed external participant. I’ll add the start trigger, automated label generation + sending, waiting with 14-day timeout, inspection decision, and refund + confirmation.
